gaps: No existing test case verifies that the correct product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or similar) is displayed on onboarding screens instead of the device code name (e.g., 'Falcon').
No existing test case covers the scenario of pairing a Falcon device and checking the Device Settings > Onboarding screen for proper product naming.
All existing test cases focus on UI elements, theming, EULA, location permissions, and navigation flows, but none address the mapping of device code names to product names in onboarding.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Falcon device displays correct product name on onboarding screen after pairing
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the device pairing screen.
Pair a Falcon device (device code name 'Falcon') with the application.
Wait for the pairing to complete successfully.
Navigate to the onboarding screen (e.g., Device Settings > Onboarding).
Observe the device name displayed on the onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The onboarding screen displays the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio' or the configured product name for Falcon), not the device code name 'Falcon'.

generated_testcases.title: Verify product name consistency across all onboarding sub-screens after Falcon pairing
steps: Launch the application and pair a Falcon device.
Navigate to the onboarding screen.
Swipe or navigate through all sub-screens/steps of the onboarding flow (e.g., welcome, features, setup tips).
At each sub-screen, capture the displayed device name or product name.
generated_testcases.expected: All onboarding sub-screens consistently display the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio') and never show the device code name 'Falcon'.

generated_testcases.title: Verify product name persists on onboarding screen after app restart with Falcon device
steps: Pair a Falcon device with the application.
Navigate to the onboarding screen and confirm the proper product name is displayed.
Force-close the application.
Re-launch the application.
Navigate again to Device Settings > Onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The onboarding screen continues to display the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio'), not the device code name 'Falcon', after application restart.

generated_testcases.title: Verify non-Falcon device shows correct product name on onboarding screen
steps: Launch the application and pair a non-Falcon device (e.g., a device with a different code name).
Navigate to Device Settings > Onboarding screen.
Observe the device name displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: The onboarding screen displays the correct product name corresponding to the paired device, not its internal code name.

generated_testcases.title: Verify product name replaces code name in onboarding header and body text
steps: Pair a Falcon device with the application.
Navigate to the onboarding screen.
Inspect all text elements on the screen, including headers, body text, and labels, for any occurrence of the string 'Falcon'.
Verify that the proper product name (e.g., 'Poly Studio') is used in all text elements.
generated_testcases.expected: The string 'Falcon' does not appear anywhere on the onboarding screen. The proper product name is used consistently in headers, body text, and labels.

generated_testcases.title: Verify product name on onboarding screen matches device info product name
steps: Pair a Falcon device with the application.
Navigate to Device Settings > Device Info (or equivalent) and note the product name displayed there.
Navigate to Device Settings > Onboarding screen.
Compare the product name shown on the onboarding screen with the product name from Device Info.
generated_testcases.expected: The product name displayed on the onboarding screen matches the product name shown in Device Info, confirming consistent naming across the application.
